name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible problem in SPARKY

labels: bug
assignees: ahansardar

---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to `...`
2. Click on `...`
3. Enter or say `...`
4. See error

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

Describe what actually happened instead.

## Screenshots or recordings

If applicable, add screenshots, screen recordings, or terminal output to help explain the problem.

## Environment

Please complete the following information:

- OS: [e.g. Windows 11]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11.8]
- SPARKY version: [e.g. 1.1.0]
- Install method: [e.g. source checkout, packaged EXE, installer build]
- Ollama version: [e.g. 0.x.x]
- Models in use: [e.g. llama3:8b, llava:7b]

## Feature area

- [ ] UI
- [ ] Voice input / microphone
- [ ] Wake word
- [ ] TTS / audio output
- [ ] Actions / automation
- [ ] Browser automation
- [ ] PDF summarization
- [ ] Updater / installer
- [ ] Other

## Logs and error messages

Paste any relevant traceback, console output, or log details here.

```text

```

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here, including whether the issue is consistent or intermittent and any recent changes that may be related.
